This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The bioactive constituents of Gonocaryum lobosporum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
